note: Raised by user as 'downloads are fucked again' after an install appeared stuck at 90%. Investigation 2026-07-20 found F1 (failed download deletes its resumable partial - 5.66GB lost live on Chroma Flash), F2 (single-stream ~19MB/s against a ~40MB/s link), F3 (no speed/ETA in the UI at all), F4 (missed/stale completion notification - instrumented, unconfirmed). User's initial theory that the MPI-310 plugin agent broke it was disproven. The original 90% Install-chip symptom did not reproduce and stays unexplained.
Created directly in doing/investigating - investigation already done in-session, findings recorded on the card. No code fix shipped yet.

F1 shipped: resume-on-failure in routes/downloadManager.js - partials kept on failure/stall/shutdown, explicit Range resume via marker-blessed resumeFromFile, cancel still deletes, resumed streams fall back to disk-read SHA256. Orphaned spec test now passes; 8 adjacent test files green. Live Range-resume verification pending app restart.
F3 shipped: live speed + ETA row in the detail slide-over (template row above the actions footer, patched in place on progress ticks). Needs renderer reload to appear.

F2 retracted (SDXL hit 40.7 MB/s on the same single-stream path that gave Chroma ~19 MB/s - object-specific, not a TCP ceiling). F4 diagnosed from trace output: the dep-level complete clears state.downloadJobs 13s before the model-level complete arrives, so the notification path finds no job. Fix not yet written.

F1 live-verified: quit at 20%, partial+marker survived, resumed at 25% (1.41GB -> 3.18GB, never reset). Temp [trace] reverted. download() now logs resume-vs-clean-start. Cancel-deletes check still pending; F4 diagnosed but unfixed.

F5 recorded: resumed installs make _checkModelJobsComplete (legacy map, reads 'downloading') call _setModelStatus on a store job already settled 'done' -> transition correctly rejected. Benign, install completed fine, but it is the legacy-map vs installStore split MPI-276 was consolidating. Not pre-existing - surfaced by the F1 resume change.

Maturity corrected investigating -> validating (investigating was not a valid maturity enum; valid set is idea/planned/in-progress/validating/complete). Card is NOT open investigation - F1 shipped and user-live-verified, F3 shipped, F2 retracted, F4/F5 diagnosed. Three OPEN items are all validation checks, not investigation: (1) 20-second CANCEL-still-deletes-partial check, never run; (2) F4 fix unwritten - clientPending filter at downloadService.js:391 omits installing; (3) F5 legacy _modelJobs map vs installStore divergence on resumed installs (benign, MPI-276 consolidation). Column stays doing.

CANCEL check PASSED live: Pony Mix install cancelled at 861MB - partial AND .cubricdl marker both deleted from G:/CubricModels/checkpoints (cancel() at downloadManager.js fs.remove + clearDownloadMarker fires correctly). F4 FIXED: root = reconciler settles+prunes the store job (disk truth, resume) while the legacy-map walk is still in its custom-node phase; the pruned snapshot dropped the FE job mid-installing because the clientPending keep-set omitted it -> model-level download:complete found jobs empty (missed toast + stale cascade toasts). Fix: installing added to the keep-set (busy-set contract, MPI-241). F5 FIXED: _setModelStatus now skips STORE writes once the store job is terminal - the map walk keeps driving its real trailing work (node requirements re-verify + completion broadcast) but no longer fights the settled store (was a rejected-transition warn per resumed install). NOTE: a first F5 attempt (skip the whole map walk when store terminal) was WRONG and reverted before commit - it would have silenced the completion broadcast and skipped the node-install self-heal, causing F4 for every reconciler-settled install. Guard test added: testMapWalkDoesNotFightSettledStore (spies transitionModel; asserts no store write on a settled job, write still happens on a live one). 35/35 download/install tests green. Full write-flip split to MPI-320. LIVE SIGN-OFF PENDING: one resumed install with custom nodes -> correct toast + zero Illegal-transition lines.

doing -> done (complete). Full live sign-off on the resumed Pony Mix install: quit at 2.29GB -> partial survived -> restart (new code) -> Range resume (log: resuming pony-mix from 2.29GB on disk) -> node phase -> correct PONY Mix installed toast, ZERO Illegal transition lines after the resume. All findings settled: F1 resume shipped+verified, F2 retracted, F3 speed/ETA shipped, F4+F5 fixed (58b54e5c) + live-verified, CANCEL-deletes-partial verified (861MB partial + marker gone). Stall/watchdog sub-path remains unstageable on demand - accepted. Full write-flip -> MPI-320. Side find while verifying: dep-level twin of F5 exists (cancel pushes cancelled onto already-complete store deps, 3 benign warns at 23:30 under old code; _setDepStatus has no terminal guard) - noted on MPI-320, dies with the flip.

summary: Archived out of board.columns.done to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archived/MPI-317/ (workspace preserved intact). mpi-archive run 2026-07-23.
